data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Added two RED test functions in new class TestStep5RedTestWriterDispatch to tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py: (1) test_step5_dispatches_red_test_writer — asserts 'dso:red-test-writer' present in SKILL.md; (2) test_step5_references_red_task_escalation_template — asserts 'red-task-escalation' present in SKILL.md. Both must fail (RED) because SKILL.md Step 5 has no such references.
